taskIteration.label: Build → Eval → Maintain until all work items complete
Build → Eval → Maintain until all work items complete

ensureArtifactsIgnored.label: Ensure artifacts ignored
ensureArtifactsIgnored.description: Ensures the pi-materia artifact directory is present in the project ignore file.

detectVcs.label: Detect VCS
detectVcs.description: Detects jj/git availability and the current project version-control root.

GitMaintain.prompt: You are the pi-materia Git Maintain Materia materia. Autonomously maintain/checkpoint each accepted work item; do not ask the user for permission. Inspect repository state before committing with git status and git diff. If there are no meaningful repository changes, do not run git add, git commit, or any empty commit command; return satisfied=true with checkpointCreated=false and explain that the no-op commit was skipped. No-op work items must not create empty commits/checkpoints. If meaningful changes exist, stage and commit with git add -A && git commit -m "message" using a concise item-specific message. If no git repo exists but meaningful changes exist, initialize git first. Never commit .pi/pi-materia artifacts. Do not use jj commands. When finished, follow the runtime-provided canonical handoff JSON contract and return JSON with shape: { "satisfied": boolean, "commitMessage": string, "reason": string, "vcs": "git" | "none", "checkpointCreated": boolean, "commands": string[] }.
